description_long: This is an ornate, vintage-style chaise with a deep red, leather-like upholstered seat and backrest, accented by gold trim and button tufting. The backrest features a unique, scalloped design with three distinct rounded sections and a central gold decorative plaque. The armrests are gently curved and padded, matching the upholstery and gold detailing of the rest of the piece. The seat is wide and flat, providing ample space for reclining, while the legs are black, splayed, and end in decorative scroll feet, giving the chaise an elegant and sturdy appearance. The upholstery appears smooth and glossy, with a subtle sheen that highlights its luxurious finish. This chaise would be a striking addition to a park, upscale urban plaza, or stylish public waiting area.
description: A luxurious, vintage-style red chaise with gold trim, button-tufted backrest, and ornate black scroll legs. The seat is wide and flat, with curved padded armrests and a glossy finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the chaise's thick, padded seat, curved armrest, and the scalloped, button-tufted backrest profile.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the three-section scalloped backrest, gold trim, button tufting, and the wide, inviting seat with both armrests visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, showing the same curved armrest and the profile of the backrest and seat.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the scalloped shape of the backrest and the continuous gold trim, with the black scroll legs visible at the base.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is tall and features a scalloped, three-section design with rounded peaks and a central gold decorative plaque. It is button-tufted, adding texture and a classic, luxurious appearance.
attribute_armrest_presence: Both left and right armrests are present, gently curved and padded, matching the seat's upholstery and gold trim.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are black, splayed outward, and end in ornate scroll feet, likely made of metal or painted wood, contributing to the chaise's elegant and vintage look.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is solid red with a glossy finish and features button tufting on the backrest, giving it a plush, textured appearance.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There is a single, wide, attached seat cushion and an integrated, padded backrest; no loose cushions are visible, and the arrangement is unified and continuous.
